Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and versions more effectively.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how timestamps are formatted in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves readability and consistency of time-related information for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast string representation of the Git hash for quick access.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves loading times by reducing the overhead of retrieving version information.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are processed in strings for faster performance.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances game performance by speeding up time-related string operations.

Removed_Camera/UI.name: FFlagPeoplePageCardMenuUseVisibleProperty_Staged
Removed_Camera/UI.mechanism: Changes how the visibility of menu items is controlled on the people page.
Removed_Camera/UI.purpose: Streamlines the user interface, making it easier for players to navigate.

Added_Network.name: FStringNetStackDummyClientEnabledMinorVersions_Staged
Added_Network.mechanism: Enables support for minor version updates in the networking stack for clients.
Added_Network.purpose: Allows players to connect more reliably to games with updated networking features.
